title: Ryvon Intelligence
desc: End-to-end product design for an AI orchestration platform that coordinates chat, voice, automation, and workflows from a single command interface. Zero to launch-ready in under 3 weeks.
result: Under 3 weeks · Full design system delivered
challengeTitle: Complex AI capabilities. Zero interface clarity.
challengeText: Ryvon Intelligence had a technically powerful product — multi-agent orchestration, voice, automation, workflows — but no interface to show for it. The founding team needed to go from concept to launch-ready design in weeks, not months, with a design system their dev team could build directly from. Every interaction had to make a complex platform feel intuitive from day one.
approachText: We began with a full information architecture pass — mapping all platform capabilities to user workflows before touching a single screen. This gave us a foundation that prevented design debt later. We then built the command interface, dashboard, agent sidebar, and workflow builder in parallel, maintaining a live design system throughout. The client had a fully handoff-ready product in under 3 weeks.

title: Abhiwan Technology
desc: Enterprise website for a multi-vertical technology company operating across XR, AI, blockchain, and gaming. Complex services, made immediately clear to global enterprise buyers.
result: Stronger global brand · Improved enterprise credibility
challengeTitle: Too much to say. No one was listening.
challengeText: Abhiwan Technology operated across four major verticals — XR, AI, blockchain, and gaming — serving enterprise clients globally. But their existing web presence made the breadth of their capabilities feel chaotic rather than impressive. Enterprise buyers were landing on the site and leaving confused. The challenge was to make a genuinely complex business feel immediately authoritative and trustworthy.
approachText: We started by restructuring the information architecture — creating a clear hierarchy that let enterprise buyers self-navigate to their relevant vertical without being overwhelmed by the full breadth of services. We then built a visual system that communicated scale and technical credibility without sacrificing clarity. The result is a site that matches the ambition of the business it represents.

results.label: Enterprise reach
results.desc: Credible across US, UK & EU markets

results.label: Enterprise credibility
results.desc: Consistently noted by new business contacts

results.label: Visual system
results.desc: Consistent across all pages and verticals

title: Grovia Platform
desc: SaaS dashboard design and development for a B2B growth platform. Complex data made simple through intentional visual hierarchy and user-first information architecture.
challengeTitle: Data without clarity is just noise.
challengeText: Grovia's platform aggregated complex growth data from multiple sources — but the existing dashboard made that data hard to read and even harder to act on. Sales teams were spending more time interpreting the tool than using it. The product needed a complete UX and visual redesign, plus a robust design system to support future feature development — all under a tight 6-week timeline.
approachTitle: Visual hierarchy as the core design system.
approachText: We began by auditing how sales teams actually used the data — what decisions were being made, what information was needed first. From that, we built a data visualisation system prioritising the highest-signal metrics and burying the noise. We then designed and developed the full dashboard UI with a component library that allowed the client's team to extend the product independently after launch.

title: Vaultboard
desc: Product design and development for a fintech asset management platform. Balancing regulatory complexity with a consumer-grade experience was the core design challenge.
challengeTitle: Compliance and usability are not opposites.
challengeText: Vaultboard needed to handle complex asset management workflows — including regulatory requirements, portfolio views, and transaction histories — while feeling as approachable as a consumer finance app. Most fintech products choose one or the other. The brief was to build something that felt effortless to use, even when the underlying complexity was significant.
approachText: We began with product strategy — mapping all user roles and their distinct workflows before a single screen was designed. This allowed us to build a UI system that surfaced the right information at the right time without overwhelming users with regulatory complexity. We then designed and developed the full platform with a component library ensuring visual consistency across every module.

results.label: Compliant & convertible
results.desc: Regulatory needs met without UX sacrifice

title: Zeno AI
desc: Brand identity and SaaS interface design for an AI productivity tool. The visual language had to feel intelligent without feeling cold — premium without being sterile.
challengeTitle: AI products that feel cold don't convert.
challengeText: Zeno AI had a genuinely useful productivity tool, but no brand and no interface. The founding team were approaching their first fundraising round and needed everything — brand, marketing site, product interface, and pitch deck — delivered on a timeline that matched their raise. The added challenge: the product had to feel warm and human, not robotic and generic like most AI tools.
approachText: We started with brand identity — developing a visual language that balanced intelligence and warmth. A system that felt premium without feeling sterile. From there, we built the marketing website, product interface, and onboarding experience using that brand system as a foundation. The pitch deck was designed last, using the full brand identity to make a strong impression with investors.

results.label: Brand to launch-ready
results.desc: From kickoff to full deliverable set

results.label: Investor confidence
results.desc: Pitch deck used in active fundraise

results.label: Design system
results.desc: Brand system applied across all touchpoints
